---
id: update-bgm
title: "Update BGM playback parameters"
description: "Update the volume, speed, or both of the currently playing background music with an optional tween transition."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Update BGM playback parameters"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/audio/bgm"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Update the volume, speed, or both of the currently playing background music with an optional tween transition.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
